judgment.summary: Strong revenue growth and positive free cash flow are countered by negative margins and a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.32 beat the 0.27 estimate by 17.8%, with the next earnings date on 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth of 30.1% shows strong top-line momentum.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.59B indicates healthy cash generation.
Total cash of $4.03B exceeds total debt of $2.74B.
Analyst growth estimate for the current FY is high at 43.5%.
negatives: Forward P/E of 66.88x represents a high valuation.
Profit margin of -28.4% shows the business is currently unprofitable.
Operating margin of -33.2% reflects significant operational losses.
Return on equity is deeply negative at -53.9%.

news.paragraph: The provided headlines contain no information relevant to Snowflake Inc. (SNOW) or its business operations. There are no apparent catalysts, such as earnings or regulatory updates, mentioned in the current news feed for an options trader to evaluate.
